bonusTasks.claudePrompt: Interview me on this estimation question: 'How many UPI transactions happen in India per day?' Walk me through how you'd evaluate my answer — structure (MECE breakdown), assumptions (stated explicitly), sanity check (order of magnitude), and insight (what does this number mean for a PM building on UPI). Give me feedback as if you are a senior PM interviewer at a Series C Indian startup.
